entries.text_ar: (The hour drew nigh and the moon was rent in twain) [54:1]. Abu Hakim ïŋ―Aqil ibn Muhammad al-Jurjani informed us (through verbal authorisation)> Abuïŋ―l-Faraj al-Qadi> Muhammad ibn Jarir> al-Husayn ibn Abi Yahya al-Maqdisi> Yahya ibn Hammad> Abu ïŋ―Awanah> al-Mughirah> Abuïŋ―l-Duha> Masruq> ïŋ―Abd Allah who said: ïŋ―The moon was split at the time of the Messenger of Allah, Allah bless him and give him peace, so the Quraysh said: ïŋ―This is an act of sorcery from the son of Abu Kabshah; he has cast a spell on you. Ask, therefore, the travellers whether they saw the moon splitïŋ―. They asked some travellers and they confirmed it. Allah, exalted is He, then revealed (The hour drew nigh and the moon was rent in twain. And if they behold a portent they turn away and say: Prolonged illusion) [54:1-2]ïŋ―.

(Lo! the guilty are in error and madnessïŋ― Lo! We have created every thing by measure) [54:47-49]. Abuïŋ―l-Qasim ïŋ―Abd al-Rahman ibn Muhammad al-Sarraj informed us (by dictation)> Abu Muhammad ïŋ―Abd Allah ibn Muhammad ibn Musa al-Kaïŋ―bi> Hamdan ibn Salih al-Ashajj> ïŋ―Abd Allah ibn ïŋ―Abd al-ïŋ―Aziz ibn Abi Rawwad> Sufyan al-Thawri> Ziyad ibn Ismaïŋ―il al-Makhzumi> Muhammad ibn ïŋ―Abbad ibn Jaïŋ―far> Abu Hurayrah who said: ïŋ―The Quraysh came to dispute the question of Destiny. Allah, exalted is He, therefore revealed (Lo! the guilty are in error and madnessïŋ― Lo! We have created every thing by measure)ïŋ―. This was narrated by Muslim from Abu Bakr ibn Abi Shaybah> Wakiïŋ―> Sufyan. By Allah, I bear witness that Abuïŋ―l-Harith Muhammad ibn ïŋ―Abd al-Rahim al-Hafiz informed us in Jurjan; he said: ïŋ―By Allah, I bear witness that Abu Nuïŋ―aym Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Ibrahim al-Bazzaz informed us; he said: ïŋ―By Allah, I bear witness that I heard ïŋ―Ali ibn Jandal saying: ïŋ―By Allah, I bear witness that I heard Abuïŋ―l-Hasan Muhammad ibn Ahmad ibn Ubayy in Khurasan say: ïŋ―By Allah, I bear witness that I heard ïŋ―Abd Allah ibn al-Saqr al-Hafiz say: ïŋ―By Allah, I bear witness that I heard ïŋ―Ufayr ibn Maïŋ―dan say: ïŋ―by Allah, I bear witness that I heard Salim ibn ïŋ―Amir say: ïŋ―By Allah, I bear witness that I heard Abu Umamah al-Bahili say: ïŋ―By Allah, I bear witness that I heard the Messenger of Allah, Allah bless him and give him peace, say: ïŋ―This verse was revealed about the deniers of Destiny (al-Qadariyyah): (Lo! the guilty are in error and madnessïŋ― Lo! We have created every thing by measure). Abu Bakr ibn al-Harith related to us> ïŋ―Abd Allah ibn Muhammad al-Asfahani> Jarir ibn Harun> ïŋ―Ali al-Tanafisi> ïŋ―Ubayd Allah ibn Musa> Bahr al-Saqaïŋ―> A Shaykh from Quraysh> ïŋ―Ataïŋ― who said: ïŋ―The bishop of Najran came to the Messenger of Allah, Allah bless him and give him peace, and said: ïŋ―O Muhammad, you claim that sins are created by measure and that the seas and heaven are also created by measure. If it is true that the seas and heaven are created by measure, sins nevertheless cannot beïŋ―. The Messenger of Allah, Allah bless him and give him peace, said: ïŋ―You are Allahïŋ―s adversaries!ïŋ― And then Allah, exalted is He, revealed (Lo! the guilty are in error and madness) up to His words (Lo! We have created every thing by measure)ïŋ―.
